<!-- Source: HLD §3.1 + §3.2 (ingestion and query sub-pipelines). Interaction-overview of real HLD flows only. -->

# Interaction Overview Diagram — Ingestion + Query

```mermaid
flowchart TB
    START([Request received]) --> KIND{Request kind}

    KIND -->|"POST /v1/documents"| ING_REF[["ref: Ingestion sequence<br/>parse -> TOC -> chunk -> embed -> upsert<br/>(see activity_diagram.md)"]]
    ING_REF --> ING_OUT([doc_id + toc returned])

    KIND -->|"POST /v1/route"| ROUTE_REF[["ref: Routing interaction<br/>cache TOC -> Router Node -> ConfidenceGate"]]
    ROUTE_REF --> ROUTE_OUT([RouteResponse - no generation])

    KIND -->|"POST /v1/answer"| ANS_REF[["ref: Answer sequence<br/>route -> retrieve -> [rerank] -> generate<br/>(see sequence_diagram.md)"]]
    ANS_REF --> GATE{fallback?}
    GATE -->|yes| FB_REF[["ref: Fallback retrieve<br/>full-doc RAG"]]
    GATE -->|no| SCOPE_REF[["ref: Targeted retrieve<br/>section_id IN (selected)"]]
    FB_REF --> GEN_REF[["ref: Generate + SSE stream"]]
    SCOPE_REF --> GEN_REF
    GEN_REF --> ANS_OUT([AnswerFinalEvent streamed])

    KIND -->|"DELETE /v1/documents/{id}"| ERASE_REF[["ref: Erasure cascade<br/>tombstone -> outbox -> sweep (OAQ-2)"]]
    ERASE_REF --> ERASE_OUT([ErasureReceipt 202])
```

> Each `ref` frame points to the detailed sequence/activity diagram. Branches match HLD §3.1/§3.2 and the openapi.yaml operation set.
